name: 05_metrics_single_contract_transport_dev_transport_uvw_controlling_doc_transport
statement:
SELECT
  'contract' AS table_family,
  'transport_dev' AS catalog_name,
  'transport' AS schema_name,
  'uvw_controlling_doc_transport' AS table_name,
  'VIEW' AS table_type,
  COUNT(*) AS row_count,
  COUNT(*) > 0 AS has_rows,
  GREATEST(MAX(try_cast(`document_date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`posting_date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`document_creation_date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`system_date_time` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`ods_created_by` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`ods_created_on` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`ods_updated_by` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`ods_updated_on` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`archive_delete_schedule_datetime_AEST` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS latest_observed_ts,
  LEAST(MIN(try_cast(`document_date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`posting_date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`document_creation_date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`system_date_time` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`ods_created_by` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`ods_created_on` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`ods_updated_by` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`ods_updated_on` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`archive_delete_schedule_datetime_AEST` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS earliest_observed_ts,
  'document_date|posting_date|document_creation_date|system_date_time|ods_created_by|ods_created_on|ods_updated_by|ods_updated_on|archive_delete_schedule_datetime_AEST' AS freshness_columns
FROM `transport_dev`.`transport`.`uvw_controlling_doc_transport`

error.message:
[INSUFFICIENT_PERMISSIONS] Insufficient privileges:
Table 'uvw_controlling_doc_transport' does not have sufficient privilege to execute because the owner of one of the underlying resources failed an authorization check. SQLSTATE: 42501
